name_en: Top-tier replica M81554 Cross-grain Grey BRAZZA Wallet made of Taïga calfskin, highlighting delicate textures with understated colors. Features a compartment for bills and receipts, as well as a coin pocket and card slots. Dimensions: 10 x 19 x 2 cm
